gaps_union: Records of processing activities (processor Art. 30 obligation)
Prohibition on sale of personal data (CCPA/CPRA service provider requirement)
Notification of legal requests (government/third-party access demands)
Data retention limits during service term
No clause requiring Vendor to maintain records of processing activities.
No clause addressing Vendor's obligations upon receiving legally binding requests from government or law enforcement for Personal Data.
Vendor obligation to maintain records of processing activities
Procedures for government or law enforcement access requests (e.g., notification to Customer)
